description.unified: Deals ATK Magic DMG to a random enemy 5 times and inflicts Electrocute. Enemies afflicted with Electrocute are stunned for 2sec [1.8 sec->2sec].
For 6 sec, restores HP every 6sec [1 sec->6sec]. The caster cannot perform other actions while the skill is active, but all allies take 60% [25%->60%] reduced Magic DMG.
For 7sec, increases the ATK of all allies by 206*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), Attack Speed by 42%, and Critical Rate by 150 [420->150].

Every (added) 15sec, deals ATK Magic DMG to 4 enemy, inflicts Electrocute for 20sec, and stuns the target for 0.6sec on a Critical Hit. Damage taken is reduced by 15% per enemy afflicted with Electrocute, stacking up to 3 times. Electrocute: Deals DoT equal to 25% ATK every 1sec for 20sec.

dark.unified: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 10% [30%->10%] for 10 sec.
If the number of enemies is 3 [{1}->3] or fewer, removes the target's beneficial effects.
When hit, reduces the attacker's Attack Speed by 200% [{2}%->200%] and their Mana by 100 [{3}->100] per sec for 5 sec [{1} sec->5 sec]. This effect can only trigger once every 5 sec [{4} sec->5 sec].

description.unified: On Normal Attack, has a 30% [{0}%->30%] chance to deal Magic Damage equal to {0}% [{1}%->{0}%] of Attack Power to 2 random enemies and reduce their Attack by {1}% [{2}%->{1}%] for 10 sec. If they are shocked, they are stunned for 0.5 sec [2 sec->0.5 sec].
